description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: test, build, and deploy, using mhart/alpine-node:0.10 as the default Docker image. Add a build_image job in the build stage that overrides the image to docker:git, runs with a docker:dind service, and executes the commands: docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com, docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/gbraad/gauth:latest ., and docker push registry.gitlab.com/gbraad/gauth:latest. Add a test job in the test stage that runs npm -d install, npm test, mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, and mv .public public, then stores the resulting public directory as an artifact. Add a pages job in the build stage that publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact and is limited to the master branch. Ensure the pipeline respects the defined stages and artifacts as described.
